title: Nova VM Spawn Instance Disk Failure (Event 12)
text: Instance failed to spawn on compute-node-04: libvirtError: Cannot access storage file '/var/lib/nova/instances/image-uuid': No such file or directory.
root_cause: Glance image synchronization delay or missing local cached disk image on the target hypervisor node.
resolution: Force Nova to re-download the target image from the Glance registry and verify disk allocation volumes on the compute node.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:10:04 INFO nova.compute.manager [req-1a2b] Creating image disk and starting instance vm-098
2026-06-25 12:10:06 ERROR nova.virt.libvirt.driver [req-1a2b] Connection to libvirt lost or storage device failed
2026-06-25 12:10:07 ERROR nova.compute.manager [req-1a2b] Instance failed to spawn: Cannot access storage file '/var/lib/nova/instances/image-uuid'

title: Keystone Authentication Token Validation Flood (Event 15)
text: Authorization failed: Token validation request timeout. Keystone database CPU utilization at 100%. Token table locks saturated.
root_cause: Orphaned client applications generating massive token request volume without local caching / token reuse.
resolution: Enable Keystone token pruning job, clear expired token records from database, and enforce PKI token validation caching on Nova/Glance services.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:12:30 INFO keystone.common.wsgi [req-3c4d] Validation request for token uuid-xxxx-yyyy
2026-06-25 12:12:35 WARNING keystone.common.wsgi [req-3c4d] Slow query validation took 4800ms. Token validation timeout.
2026-06-25 12:12:36 ERROR keystone.common.wsgi [req-3c4d] Authorization failed: Keystone backend database connection timeout.

title: Neutron Virtual Tap Bridge Interface Failure (Event 22)
text: Failed to bind port tap-f83d9210-44: Device or resource busy. VM spawned without virtual NIC connectivity.
root_cause: Open vSwitch (OVS) agent network bridge state desynchronization or conflicting port namespace.
resolution: Restart neutron-openvswitch-agent, delete the stale port entry using ovs-vsctl, and force Neutron to re-bind port connectivity.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:15:40 INFO neutron.agent.linux.interface [req-5e6f] Creating bridge interface tap-f83d9210-44
2026-06-25 12:15:42 ERROR neutron.agent.linux.interface [req-5e6f] Failed to create bridge interface: Device or resource busy
2026-06-25 12:15:44 WARN neutron.plugins.ml2.drivers.agent [req-5e6f] Port tap-f83d9210-44 failed to transition to active state.

title: Glance Image Store Backend Exhaustion (Event 28)
text: Image upload failed: Storage write error on volume /var/lib/glance/images. Disk space completely full (100% capacity).
root_cause: Unchecked accumulation of old, unregistered image snapshots in raw storage directories.
resolution: Clean up unreferenced files using glance-cache-manage, delete orphaned images, and adjust default glance storage limits.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:18:15 INFO glance.api.v1.images [req-7g8h] Uploading raw image snapshot-2026
2026-06-25 12:18:18 ERROR glance.store.filesystem [req-7g8h] Write failed: No space left on device
2026-06-25 12:18:20 ERROR glance.api.v1.images [req-7g8h] Image upload failed: Storage backend write failure.

title: Nova CPU Overcommit Scheduler Rejection
text: Nova Scheduler failed to place instance: No valid host found. CPU overcommit ratio (16:1) exceeded on all available compute hosts.
root_cause: Improper sizing rules or node grouping configurations in nova.conf on scheduler master.
resolution: Adjust cpu_allocation_ratio configuration or migrate idle virtual machine workloads to secondary underutilized hypervisors.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:21:00 INFO nova.scheduler.filter_scheduler [req-9i0j] Filtering 12 compute hosts for VM flavor m1.xlarge
2026-06-25 12:21:02 WARN nova.scheduler.filter_scheduler [req-9i0j] Host compute-01 filtered: CPU limit exceeded
2026-06-25 12:21:04 ERROR nova.conductor.manager [req-9i0j] No valid host was found for group placement.

title: Cinder Volume Attachment Timeout (ISCSI Target)
text: Failed to attach volume vol-184920: Device attachment timed out after 120 seconds. iSCSI portal connection rejected.
root_cause: iSCSI daemon (iscsid) freeze or network path breakdown between hypervisor host and storage target array.
resolution: Restart iscsid service on hypervisor node, ping target SAN portals, and execute SCSI bus rescan command.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:23:10 INFO cinder.volume.manager [req-1k2l] Attaching volume vol-184920 to VM instance-829
2026-06-25 12:23:45 WARN nova.virt.libvirt.volume [req-1k2l] Slow connection to iSCSI target portal 10.100.20.5:3260
2026-06-25 12:25:10 ERROR nova.compute.manager [req-1k2l] Attachment timed out: libvirt failed to bind block device.

title: Neutron Security Group Rules Apply Fail
text: Failed to apply iptables security group rules for instance-092. Security policy rules configuration sync loop aborted.
root_cause: Lock saturation or deadlock in local iptables table modification scripts on hypervisor.
resolution: Clear system iptables lock file, execute reload commands on network agent, and verify rules syntax.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:28:05 INFO neutron.agent.linux.iptables_manager [req-3m4n] Applying security group rules for device tap-xxxx
2026-06-25 12:28:08 ERROR neutron.agent.linux.iptables_manager [req-3m4n] Lock acquisition timeout: Failed to update security chains
2026-06-25 12:28:10 WARN neutron.agent.securitygroups_rpc [req-3m4n] Security rules out of sync on target compute node.

title: RabbitMQ Message Queue Connection Dropout
text: AMQP server connection lost on compute-node-12. Failed to publish cast message: Connection reset by peer.
root_cause: RabbitMQ broker cluster partition event or broker memory alarm trigger causing connections to drop.
resolution: Check RabbitMQ cluster sync state, clear memory alarms by scaling memory threshold, and force compute agents to reconnect.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:31:02 INFO oslo.messaging._drivers.impl_rabbit [req-5o6p] Connecting to AMQP broker on rabbitmq-01:5672
2026-06-25 12:31:08 ERROR oslo.messaging._drivers.impl_rabbit [req-5o6p] AMQP connection closed by broker: Socket error
2026-06-25 12:31:10 WARN oslo.messaging.rpc.client [req-5o6p] Re-enqueueing RPC cast message for service compute.

title: Glance Image Signature Verification Failed
text: SignatureVerificationError: Signature verification failed for image-089. Metadata signature does not match registry key.
root_cause: Expired public keys in Keystone credential manager or corrupted image upload metadata.
resolution: Re-import updated public keys into Keystone credential registry, sign the image volume, and update metadata fields.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:34:10 INFO glance.api.middleware.image_validation [req-7q8r] Initiating signature check for image image-089
2026-06-25 12:34:12 ERROR glance.api.middleware.image_validation [req-7q8r] Verification failed: Public key mismatch
2026-06-25 12:34:14 WARN glance.api.v2.images [req-7q8r] Blocked request to serve image image-089 due to security rule.

title: Nova Console Auth Proxy Connection Failure
text: nova-consoleauth connection refused. Cannot authenticate WebSocket token. VNC console access disabled.
root_cause: Service crash of nova-consoleauth daemon on controller node.
resolution: Restart nova-consoleauth service via systemctl daemon controls and monitor console validation queues.
logs:
2026-06-25 12:37:11 INFO nova.consoleauth.manager [req-9s0t] Checking VNC WebSocket token validations
2026-06-25 12:37:14 ERROR nova.console.websocketproxy [req-9s0t] Connection refused while validating token with consoleauth service
2026-06-25 12:37:16 WARN nova.console.websocketproxy [req-9s0t] Terminating client VNC session proxy connection.
